issues.description: First effect missing condition: should check 'LeaderHasType' for {Supernovas}, not 'Always'. Current DSL gives Blocker unconditionally.

Second effect is incomplete/missing. Text describes '[Once Per Turn] If this Character would be removed from the field by your opponent's effect, you may rest 1 of your opponent's Characters instead.' This requires a Counter trigger (not OnAttacked), a condition checking removal threat, and action to Rest opponent's character. DSL currently only covers the Blocker activation on attack.
First effect trigger should be 'Trigger' (passive conditional grant), not 'Activated' (player-initiated). 'Activated' implies manual activation; the Blocker is granted passively if condition is met.
